case_title: SANTOS VIDAL RODRIGUEZ VS. AGUSTIN ORELLANA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-06-2020 - JUDGMENT.
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT ORELLANA, AGUSTIN HEARING SET FOR NOV-13-2020 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-04-2020 - CONTINUED TO ALLOW FOR SPANISH INTERPERTER FOR PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT TO OCT-06-2020 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF SANTOS VIDAL RODRIGUEZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT AGUSTIN ORELLANA IS PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PANG LY; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
REMARK: RETURN OF SMALL CLAIMS "NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT". SENT TO: DEFENDANT - AGUSTIN ORELLANA; (ENVELOPE MARKED:RETURNED TO SENDER - ATTEMPTED - NOT KNOWN - UNABLE TO FORWARD)
DECLARATION OF CURRENT ADDRESS (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY DEFENDANT ORELLANA, AGUSTIN
ORDER CASE CONTINUED TO PROVIDE SPANISH INTERPRETER. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $0.00 - SERVED JUL-05-2020, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ORELLANA, AGUSTIN
REMARK:SMALL CLAIMS CONTINUE ORDER,SENT TO DEFENDANT, UNABLE TO FOWARD.

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY AGUSTIN ORELLANA IS GRANTED. CONTINUED TO APR-28-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN 506 FOR TRIAL. PLAINTIFF SANTOS VIDAL RODRIGUEZ IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER PATRICE BENNAISA. DEFENDANT AGUSTIN ORELLANA IS PRESENT ASSISTTED BY COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPARETER MONIQUE HERNANDEZ. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-28-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAY-28-2021 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF SANTOS VIDAL RODRIGUEZ IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER PATRICE BINNAISA. DEFENDANT AGUSTIN ORELLANA IS PRESENT ASSISTTED BY COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPARETER MONIQUE HERNANDEZ. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT FOR A $325 PAYMENT IN CHECK TENDERED TO THE PLAINTIFF IN COURT. APPEARANCES IS REQUIRED AT THE MAY-28-2021 HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,800.00 FILED BY RODRIGUEZ, SANTOS VIDAL AS TO DEFENDANT ORELLANA, AGUSTIN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-04-2020 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS OR OTHER CONTACT INFORMATION FILED BY DEFENDANT ORELLANA, AGUSTIN
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY AGUSTIN ORELLANA SET FOR DEC-23-2020 IS CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO APR-28-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN 506.
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE TO ALLOW FOR SPANISH INTERPERTERS FOR PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-06-2020 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-06-2020 BY PANG LY. PLAINTIFF SANTOS VIDAL RODRIGUEZ IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER MANTI HENRIQUEZ. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. COMMISSIONER: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RODRIGUEZ, SANTOS VIDAL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ORELLANA, AGUSTIN $250.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $325.00, PLAINTIFF PRESENTS EVIDENCE THAT THE UNIT HAD EXCESSIVE MOISTURE AND CAUSED MOLD TO DAMAGE HIS PERSONAL PROPERTY. DEFENDANT WAS ENTITLED TO 30 DAY NOTICE OF LEASE TERMINATION, COSTS FOR REASONABLE REPAIR AND THERE IS NO BAD FAITH FOR RETURNING THE SECURITY DEPOSIT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY AGUSTIN ORELLANA SET FOR NOV-13-2020 IS CONTINUED TO DEC-23-2020 AT 10:00 AM IN 506 TO PROVIDE SPANISH INTERPRETER. PLAINTIFF SANTOS VIDAL RODRIGUEZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT AGUSTIN ORELLANA IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY HIS SON JIM ORELLANA WITH SPANISH INTERPRETATION AND WAS GIVEN THE INTERPRETER'S OATH BY THE COURTROOM CLERK. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. COMMISSIONER: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. DEPUTY: R. ROSADO NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER MOTION TO VACATE IS GRANTED
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
